objective: Use the preferred workflow to generate an LLM-powered activation note for this project.

params.content:
# OpenRouter Activation Note

The framework is configured to use the OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible endpoint with model openai/gpt-4.1-mini.

Next step: replace heuristic planning tasks with model-planned tasks and inspect the produced traces.
